title: Routing, Selection, Translation, and Redundancy · Incident Case: Net Route Preference
summary: Connect branch, headquarters, cloud, and internet routes while diagnosing asymmetry and failover. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net route preference increment in a routed hybrid branch design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish prefix length, administrative distance, and protocol metric in route-selection evidence.
Compare BGP, EIGRP, and OSPF scope, neighbor behavior, path information, convergence, and use cases at N10-009 depth.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
